title: Xiaheipi 12 x 16 Inch solid wood Picture Frame, Black Collage Photo Display Frames Solid Wood, Wall Mounting Certificate, Wall Hanging Pictures Photo Frames for 30x40 cm 5D Painting
seller_info_text: Across the ocean to see you
features: 【Premium Material】frames are constructed of solid wood material, which is sturdy, and durable. The transparent plastic front gives a good view position of your picture and preserves the life of your photo. The transparent plastic surface film can be peeled off.

【Easy to Use】The black photo frame set comes with hanging hardware for hassle-free display in both horizontal and vertical. You can install the photo frame vertically or horizontally according to your preference.
【Classic Design】The black molding design draws attention to the ornate picture frames and makes them more noticeable. This traditional design complements any wall decor or desk ornament.

【Wide Applications】Our photo wall frame is great for your home, office, studio, or gallery. A great addition to any room, professionally display your treasured moment in this photo frame. Plastic mirror is easy to wipe clean with a dry cloth.

【What You Will Get】You will get one black mounted frame, and 3cm four-sided photo decorative cardboard. The jammed paper is generally alkaline, which can delay the yellowing of photos from moisture and make the photos appear more beautiful.
description: Product Description Tip: Remove the protective film on both sides before use. Product Information - Product Name: Picture Frames - Material: Solid Wood - Color: Black - Size: 30*40 cm/12*16 inch Pack Includes: 1 * Photo Frames with Four-sided 3cm Photo Decorative Cardboards Features: - These picture frames are made of solid wood, which is lightweight and sturdy for long time use. - The display frames can protect the photos of your valuable artwork from dust, scratches. - The photo frame kit is a long-lasting way to showcase your good memories, you can put it on the office desk for loading your thoughts. - You can hang wall frame in the bedroom, record the good times of you and your family, or put it in the living room for decoration or recording. - Suitable for putting photos size of 30.5*40.6 cm/12*16 inches, can be hung or displayed vertically or horizontally.
